rationale: The cited paper focuses on translating promotion elasticity decompositions into net unit-sales switching in CPG scanner-panel data, while the citing paper models e-commerce task-completion conversion with hierarchical probit clickstream models—so topical overlap appears limited. However, the only match evidence is a bare DOI reference (no local citation context), and both involve decomposing purchase behavior into components/stages, so there is not enough evidence to safely classify this as an obvious mention-only citation.
